##MEMBER BPXPRM00
ROOT FILESYSTEM('OMVS.ROOT.ZFS')
     TYPE(ZFS) MODE(RDWR)
MOUNT FILESYSTEM('OMVS.ETC.ZFS')
      MOUNTPOINT('/etc')
      TYPE(ZFS) MODE(RDWR)
MAXPROCSYS(3000)          /* max processes per system */
TZ(EST5EDT)
##MEMBER BPXPRM01
 MOUNT  FILESYSTEM('ZFS.TOMMY')
        MOUNTPOINT('/u/tommy')
        TYPE(ZFS) NOAUTOMOVE

 /* MOUNT  FILESYSTEM('TOMMY.PSI.ZFS') */
 /*        MOUNTPOINT('/u/tommy/PSI') */
 /*        TYPE(ZFS) NOAUTOMOVE */

 MOUNT  FILESYSTEM('ZFS.GRB')
        MOUNTPOINT('/usr/lpp/grb')
        TYPE(ZFS)
